name: Location
description: Location schema from Censys Platform API

city.description: The English name of the detected city.

continent.description: The English name of the detected continent (North America, Europe, Asia, South America, Africa, Oceania, Antarctica).

coordinates.description: The estimated coordinates of the detected location.

country.description: The English name of the detected country.

country_code.description: The detected two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (US, CN, GB, RU, ...).

postal_code.description: The postal code (if applicable) of the detected location.

province.description: The state or province name of the detected location.

registered_country.description: The English name of the registered country.

registered_country_code.description: The registered country's two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (US, CN, GB, RU, ...).

timezone.description: The IANA time zone database name of the detected location.
